title: habenaria rotundifolia
intro: Habenaria rotundifolia, also known as the rounded orchid or round-leaved spider orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, habenaria rotundifolia is typically used in infusions or decoctions, and it is also used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
